title: DoorDash Inc (DASH) Q4 2024 Earnings: EPS Matches Estimate at $0.33, Revenue Surpasses Expectations at $2.9 Billion
text: DoorDash reported Q4 2024 earnings of $0.33 per share, matching the forecast, with revenue of $2.87 billion, slightly surpassing the anticipated $2.84 billion. In 2024, DoorDash grew revenue 24% year-over-year and generated its first full year of positive GAAP net income, producing $123 million in net income attributable to common stockholders and $1.9 billion in Adjusted EBITDA. Total Orders increased 19% year-over-year to 685 million and Marketplace Gross Order Value (GOV) rose 21% year-over-year to $21.3 billion. The company achieved record monthly active users (MAUs) of over 42 million in December 2024, up from over 37 million in December 2023. DashPass and Wolt+ members reached over 22 million, up from over 18 million at year-end 2023. These results marked a significant milestone in DoorDash's journey to sustained profitability.
